name: Christine Harbin
subject: More taxes?
body:
| | [Web Version](http://view.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=916ed6271996e75924d354d4e5a9496c9932fa500e07916283dcc1ad992c69db032630def7228825665d15f0e7349fe0f2911002aeadcdf6fb788bebe300c481666b5f5431cedae1)
---
| | | | [ ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=bdb6a8731807cf2bea21e53624178f69347a0fbaf13c1c0fff903363552d1fcd18f2e10c03c4b3deb4422802a211ff59223e33c4ad125c9f "https://americansforprosperity.org/")
---
| | | | |
---
| | Dear Peter,

We're marshaling our unmatched grassroots network to tell Congress to ditch its risky new 20 percent tax on all U.S. imports, and Americans for Prosperity wants you to help us.
The proposed new tax is known as the Border Adjustment Tax (B.A.T.), which would hurt consumers by leading to higher prices for the everyday products you rely on, like gas, clothes, and groceries.
We've released a new television ad calling on Congress to abandon this harmful consumer tax. The full ad can be viewed [here.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=bdb6a8731807cf2bf13b086c5a5a799de24ad83538ecd19795d24f282ccb5b16bd82bb41e1ee41b22821b28839ced251d3b4a1c99bd72eec "here.")
[](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=bdb6a8731807cf2bb9cc9bb062761874a43099946ca880dad1b872de618e442accc83f5b292c5663c63480367a1575a023f5345cc23d0585)
Our president, Tim Phillips, told reporters: "Imposing a massive 20-percent import tax is the wrong approach. A border adjustment tax would harm hard working families that deserve relief from the tax code, not a new consumer tax that would drive up the cost of everyday items."
The ad calls on volunteers like you to urge lawmakers to scrap the idea of imposing a $1.2 trillion consumer tax. Will you join us? [**
Call your representative today and tell them to say NO! to a B.A.T. consumer tax.**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=bdb6a8731807cf2b0f24a2f6cf47e09b5c37e6e2cbc69d8cf37cd3549f756c91b0eb8d2f5dff6aa26e12d1f54b9304e9f84e2586d75006eb "Call your representative today and tell them to say NO! to a B.A.T. consumer tax.")
In liberty,

Chrissy Harbin
Vice President of External Affairs
Americans for Prosperity

_P.S. Hey, Peter, don't forget to [watch AFP's new ad](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=bdb6a8731807cf2b97745a211dc85fd3439c2df5faf9463fcea84882b4ffbb22aeca6ed150da3a3c624e4d6b9a4df29b2708b11519e13cb5 "watch AFP's new ad") urging Congress to abandon this harmful policy!_
---

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com **
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=b4f04bbb50358cda4e16cca69a6a0da8f0f8d7922410adcfac97e3d7ecb9fd1b8de0305dba56d8291898fee2fa0b45275df4e552d47d0af9) Americans For Prosperity Foundation 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201 ******[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c7
54b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=
003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c7
54b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=
003i00000262AbVAAU)******

The proposed new tax is known as the Border Adjustment Tax (B.A.T.), which would hurt consumers by leading to higher prices for the everyday products you rely on, like gas, clothes, and groceries. We've released a new television ad calling on Congress to abandon this harmful consumer tax. The full ad can be viewed "here." Our president, Tim Phillips, told reporters: "Imposing a massive 20-percent import tax is the wrong approach. A border adjustment tax would harm hard working families that deserve relief from the tax code, not a new consumer tax that would drive up the cost of everyday items." The ad calls on volunteers like you to urge lawmakers to scrap the idea of imposing a $1.2 trillion consumer tax. Will you join us? "Call your representative today and tell them to say NO! to a B.A.T. consumer tax." In liberty, Chrissy Harbin Vice President of External Affairs Americans for Prosperity P.S. Hey, Peter, don't forget to "watch AFP's new ad" urging Congress to abandon this harmful policy!

name: Democrats.org
subject: Here's why we've got to elect more Democrats:
body:
It's time to come together and fight back. **Pitch in whatever you can to help elect Democrats up and down the ticket.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e7263ec/861164337/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1")**
[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e7263ed/861164337/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e7263ea/861164337/VEsF/ "http://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e7263eb/861164337/VEsC/ "http://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1")
**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e7263e8/861164337/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1")

[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e7263f6/861164337/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e7263f7/861164337/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e7263f4/861164337/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e7263f5/861164337/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1")
**

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e7263f8/861164337/VEsEBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=21+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e7263f9/861164337/VEsEBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=22+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e726386/861164337/VEsEBg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=23+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c946/4067b0a/2ec018601/7e726387/861164337/VEsEAQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=24+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&source=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1&refcode=em_20170411_dnc2_v2s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: FlaDems.com
subject: he's spent HOW much?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Friend,

Listen, there really isn't a simpler way to say this: Donald Trump has spent a LOT of time in Florida as president.

**Since he 's been here so much, we know one thing: Floridians must pay for Trump's MASSIVE security detail one way or another.** That means passing the buck to taxpayers and forcing local business closures each time Trump visits his luxurious resort in Palm Beach.

[**That is why Florida Democrats are demanding that the federal government reimburse Floridians for the security costs incurred by Trump 's trips. Click here and add your name if you agree.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b26b/1a5213b3/769c4812/718ba64e/1900354184/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWSVQwMUZVRWhQVGtVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-trump-reimburses-florida?source=em041117&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+That+is+why+Florida+Democrats+are+demand&utm_campaign=em041117&refcode=em041117")

Floridians shouldn't be required to pay the costs for Trump to be in Mar-a-Lago. Trump and the federal government should reimburse us for these massive costs, plain and simple.

[**Agree? Add your name here.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b26b/1a5213b3/769c4812/718ba649/1900354184/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWSVQwMUZVRWhQVGtVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-trump-reimburses-florida?source=em041117&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Agree+Add+your+name+here&utm_campaign=em041117&refcode=em041117")

Thanks,

FlaDems.com

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b26b/1a5213b3/769c4812/718ba648/1900354184/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI3NjljNDgxMiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6Ijc3YjRiMjZiIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/769c4812/77b4b26b?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+here&utm_campaign=em041117&source=em041117&refcode=em041117") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Katie McGinty
subject: The road ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friend --

I can't tell you how proud I am of everyone who worked so hard for Team Katie last fall: From the thousands of volunteers who came out to knock on doors for us, to the tens of thousands who donated to power our grassroots campaign.

Even though we fell short, my parents taught me never to give up on something I believed in, and that's why I'm reaching out today.

**Every single day since the inauguration has brought another reminder of why our fight was worth it.[And the best way we can keep our fight going now is by joining the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee to elect local Democrats across America and end Republican gerrymandering >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/790359907579723776/487823622430261248?signup_page_KEY=6419)**

| **[**I 'm in. Add my name >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/790359907579723776/487823622430261248?signup_page_KEY=6419)**
---

The most dangerous thing about this period of all-Republican leadership is how it happened.

Here in Pennsylvania, our statewide elections were some of the closest in the country in 2016. But in the legislative and congressional races -- fought on gerrymandered, Republican-drawn maps -- Republicans now control 61% of our state legislature and 72% of our congressional delegation, even though registered Democrats outnumber Republicans by nearly 10%. That's not democracy!

Because there's so little accountability for those who control the maps, politicians in statehouses can essentially choose their voters -- instead of their voters choosing them. That kind of affront to democracy has repercussions up and down the ticket. That's how we end up with legislation giving billionaires tax breaks or installing a climate-denier as head of the EPA. They don't think they have to listen to you.

**Well I 'm here to tell you that they're wrong. We will not be silenced.**

If we tear down their gerrymandered maps -- here in Pennsylvania and across the nation -- we can make sure our marching and organizing and _voting_ truly makes a difference in people's lives. **[If you're with me, sign on right now to join this next fight. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/790359907579723776/487823622430261248?signup_page_KEY=6419)**

Thanks,
Katie

---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/790359907579723776/415766028392333312).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

subject: On pace in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re only one week from the special election in Georgia. |

Friend, With only 7 DAYS until the special election in Georgia for Secretary Tom Price’s former seat, we’re coming directly to you. The Democrats have raised over $8 MILLION for an out-of-state, Nancy Pelosi-backed candidate, and will continue to pump millions into this election over the next 7 days. We need to raise $42,450 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to even stay on pace and continue to defend President Trump.
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Emergency GA-6 Contribution: PENDING Deadline: 4/11/17 at 11:59 PM CONTRIBUTE $1 Because of all your hard work to defend the president from the vicious attacks by the Democrats, we will send any person who rushes a contribution before 11:59 PM tonight a FREE “I SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP” bumper sticker. Please, step up NOW with a contribution of just $1 before midnight and receive your FREE “I SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP” bumper sticker. This district has been in Republican hands since 1979 and Democrats are spending millions to buy it back. It’s time to defend what we’ve worked so hard for in 2016, Friend. And remember, with ANY contribution received before 11:59 PM TONIGHT, you will automatically be sent a free “I SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP” bumper sticker. Contribute just $1 now to defend President Trump and win this race. Thank you in advance for your support, Team TRUMP

name: Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
subject: Senator Bill Stanley Endorses Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
April 11th, 2017
WARRENTON, VA - Today, Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for Lieutenant Governor, announced the endorsement of Senate Republican Whip Bill Stanley, an influential regional leader representing Southside and Southwest Virginia."Jill Vogel understands how to bring jobs and economic development back to Southside and Southwest," said Senator Bill Stanley. "In Richmond, Jill and I have worked together on important issues such as regulatory reform, tax relief, and infrastructure development. Jill's pro-job platform will make us competitive, bring in new industries, and help build an enduring economy capable of providing for our children and grandchildren.""I am honored to have the endorsement of a strong leader and respected Senator like Senator Bill Stanley," responded Senator Jill Vogel. "In the Senate he has been a great partner in efforts to bring new jobs, economic growth, and transportation improvements to areas in need. As a firm believer in fostering opportunity and growth everywhere, I look forward to working with Senator Stanley to bring jobs back by making Virginia competitive again."In recent years, Virginia's business competitiveness has fallen from 5th to 13th and its economic growth rate has fallen to 48th in the nation. Southside and Southwest Virginia have been particularly hard hit through a loss of manufacturing jobs and tobacco revenue. Furthermore, as border regions, they remain particularly vulnerable to losing jobs to North Carolina if Virginia fails to reform its tax codeAs a leading proponent of job creation, Jill Vogel has fought for policies to bring jobs back. She introduced this year's "Regulatory Rollback Amendment" and crafted a tax relief plan to keep Virginia competitive with North Carolina while refunding budget surpluses to taxpayers. Additionally, she wrote legislation to greatly expand the cultivation of industrial hemp as a crop capable of replacing the jobs and revenue lost through declines in tobacco cultivation, with hopes for a Virginia success story similar to Kentucky's.Since his election in 2011, Bill Stanley has been a strong voice for Southside and Southwest in Virginia's Capitol. He has sponsored legislation to spur economic development to create jobs and reduce unemployment in Southside Virginia. His energy, enthusiasm, grassroots focus, and track record of effective leadership has made a difference in improving the economy of Southside and Southwest Virginia as well as the lives of all Virginians who call the region home.

###
---
| |
---
| Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186

---
| Follow Jill on Facebook and Twitter for Campaign Updates

---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nFfF7kY0uIJVXz_R_LhSUQAFNXOBK4OUGJSrWMNayr6YIIUgzvPDv5IzARBLFHzFW8ZjTRPe5heDl7fMD5taq6uUBR3o5TOXzdDUVv3pH36HxK8-lj43ln4NdtBGSIJwpwU9yuD8If-4WMomzkHrSHUt8tbG6c1J2Or3ILc8-4o=&c=bAjDBv0gsTDuLM4eLXPbIOFFzU4WbjQoSfXcpQG08IJ_gdin7659fw==&ch=PEumJPkBlI1dGUzjEOMTUBvb733iGteO6OMv-S--9nZWyiytkpL-Uw==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nFfF7kY0uIJVXz_R_LhSUQAFNXOBK4OUGJSrWMNayr6YIIUgzvPDv5IzARBLFHzFWMipYnMIxFrG2WtvjQ5Ft8QZcNUA1TlSWQemfL1z36umKNOHPP9x6hx0xzECn76W7len6mInTPa3sd9UtsdmUXidTHk2xxT0&c=bAjDBv0gsTDuLM4eLXPbIOFFzU4WbjQoSfXcpQG08IJ_gdin7659fw==&ch=PEumJPkBlI1dGUzjEOMTUBvb733iGteO6OMv-S--9nZWyiytkpL-Uw==)

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: a pattern of anti-Semitism
body:
We will not stand for anti-Semitism
---
**Add your name to call on the Trump administration to reject and denounce anti-Semitism:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stand-Against-Anti-Semitism1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170411_tp_nd&source=em_20170411_tp_nd")**
Friend -- what I'm about to share with you is shocking and tone-deaf.

**During today's press briefing, White House Press Secretary Sean Spicer casually dismissed the history of the Holocaust, denying that Hitler "gassed his own people" and claiming that he "didn't even sink to using chemical weapons."**

Even if this was a case of simple ignorance, there has been a vein of anti-Semitism running through the Trump administration since Day One.

Denying the atrocities committed by Adolf Hitler and the Nazi regime is a tried-and-true tactic used by neo-Nazi and white supremacist groups that have become emboldened since Donald Trump first announced his campaign for president. Some of those groups were quick to heap praise on Spicer for his comments today, just as they did when the White House failed to mention the Jewish community in their statement marking Holocaust Remembrance Day.

The Trump administration has similarly dismissed the rise in hate crimes since Trump was elected, the increase in bomb threats against Jewish community centers, and the desecration of Jewish cemeteries. At a recent press conference, Donald Trump personally called the Jewish reporter asking about these acts of hatred a liar.

And Trump has elevated white supremacists to senior positions in his administration. At one point, he even rearranged the National Security Council to include his white supremacist chief strategist, Steve Bannon.

Rejecting and denouncing anti-Semitism from the White House is a low-enough bar that even this administration can clear.

The Trump administration must apologize for this outrageous statement and their pattern of anti-Semitism, and fire white supremacists like Steve Bannon. Now.

**Add your name if you agree:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stand-Against-Anti-Semitism1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170411_tp_nd&source=em_20170411_tp_nd")**
Thank you,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c95b/4067b0a/2ebe47125/7e726e74/435752580/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170411_tp_nd&source=em_20170411_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c95b/4067b0a/2ebe47125/7e726e75/435752580/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170411_tp_nd&source=em_20170411_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c95b/4067b0a/2ebe47125/7e726e72/435752580/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170411_tp_nd&source=em_20170411_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c95b/4067b0a/2ebe47125/7e726e73/435752580/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170411_tp_nd&source=em_20170411_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: We will not stand for anti-Semitism Add your name to call on the Trump administration to reject and denounce anti-Semitism: "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utmcampaign=em20170411tpnd&source=em20170411tpnd") Friend -- what I'm about to share with you is shocking and tone-deaf. During today's press briefing, White House Press Secretary Sean Spicer casually dismissed the history of the Holocaust, denying that Hitler "gassed his own people" and claiming that he "didn't even sink to using chemical weapons." Even if this was a case of simple ignorance, there has been a vein of anti-Semitism running through the Trump administration since Day One. Denying the atrocities committed by Adolf Hitler and the Nazi regime is a tried-and-true tactic used by neo-Nazi and white supremacist groups that have become emboldened since Donald Trump first announced his campaign for president. Some of those groups were quick to heap praise on Spicer for his comments today, just as they did when the White House failed to mention the Jewish community in their statement marking Holocaust Remembrance Day. The Trump administration has similarly dismissed the rise in hate crimes since Trump was elected, the increase in bomb threats against Jewish community centers, and the desecration of Jewish cemeteries. At a recent press conference, Donald Trump personally called the Jewish reporter asking about these acts of hatred a liar. And Trump has elevated white supremacists to senior positions in his administration. At one point, he even rearranged the National Security Council to include his white supremacist chief strategist, Steve Bannon. Rejecting and denouncing anti-Semitism from the White House is a low-enough bar that even this administration can clear. The Trump administration must apologize for this outrageous statement and their pattern of anti-Semitism, and fire white supremacists like Steve Bannon. Now. Add your name if you agree: "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utmcampaign=em20170411tpnd&source=em20170411tpnd") Thank you, Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
